2606.27361.title: Autoregressive Boltzmann Generators
2606.27361.paper_summary: Efficient sampling of molecular systems at thermodynamic equilibrium is a hallmark challenge in statistical physics. This challenge has driven the development of Boltzmann Generators (BGs), which allow rapid generation of uncorrelated equilibrium samples by combining a generative model with exact likelihoods and an importance sampling correction. However, modern BGs predominantly rely on normalizing flows (NFs), which either suffer from limited expressivity due to strict invertibility constraints (discrete time) or computationally expensive likelihoods (continuous time). In this paper, we propose Autoregressive Boltzmann Generators (ArBG) -- a novel autoregressive modelling framework -- that overcomes these limitations by departing from the flow-based BG paradigm. ArBG circumvents the topological constraints of flows and enables sequential inference-time interventions, while offering enhanced scalability by leveraging architectures effective in Large Language Models. We empirically demonstrate that ArBG leads to significant improvements over flow-based models across all benchmarks, but particularly in larger peptide systems such as the 10-residue Chignolin. Furthermore, we introduce Robin, a 132 million parameter transferable model trained with the ArBG framework which improves over the previous state-of-the-art, reducing the zero-shot energy error, E-W$_2$, on 8-residue systems by over 60$\%$. The code can be found at the following link: https://github.com/danyalrehman/autobg.
2606.27361.paper_summary_zh: 在熱力學平衡下有效取樣分子系統是統計物理中的一個重要挑戰。這一挑戰促進了玻爾茲曼生成器（BGs）的發展，該生成器通過將生成模型與精確的似然性和重要性取樣修正相結合，實現了快速生成無關的平衡樣本。然而，現代BGs主要依賴於正規化流（NFs），這些流要麼因為嚴格的可逆性限制而表現力有限（離散時間），要麼因為計算成本高昂的似然性（連續時間）。在本文中，我們提出了自回歸玻爾茲曼生成器（ArBG）——一種新穎的自回歸建模框架——通過脫離基於流的BG範式來克服這些限制。ArBG 繞過流的拓撲限制，並使得在推斷過程中進行序列干預成為可能，同時通過利用在大型語言模型中有效的架構來增強可擴展性。我們實證證明，ArBG 在所有基準測試中相較於基於流的模型有顯著改善，特別是在較大的肽系統中，如10殘基的Chignolin。此外，我們介紹了Robin，一個具有1.32億參數的可轉移模型，該模型使用ArBG框架訓練，改進了之前的最先進技術，將8殘基系統的零樣本能量誤差E-W$_2$降低了超過60$\%$。代碼可以在以下鏈接找到：https://github.com/danyalrehman/autobg。
2606.27361.author: Danyal Rehman et.al.
2606.27361.authors: Danyal Rehman, Charlie B. Tan, Yoshua Bengio, Avishek Joey Bose, Alexander Tong
